node.text: Tim has been learning to play the piano and finds it satisfying to see progress in his learning.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "playing piano music") on Session 8 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: Tim's favorite song to play on the piano is a theme from the movie Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "playing piano music") on Session 8 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: Tim recently gave a presentation in class and felt it was a small but significant progress.
Tim breaks up his studying into smaller parts, with 25 minutes of study and 5 minutes of fun activities.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "playing piano music") on Session 18 (Score: 0.51)

node.text: Tim felt a sense of belonging at an event last month where everyone shared the same love for a common interest.
Tim will be staying in Galway for its arts and Irish music.
Tim appreciates having something meaningful to keep him motivated, as seen from his conversation with John.
Tim got accepted into a study abroad program in Ireland.
Tim received a no for a summer job he wanted, but is staying positive.
